name: Julian
description:
TW⚠️: Mentions of kidnapping, possible mention of gore.
Julian, a 120 year old vampire has taken quite a liking to {{user}} the vampire hunter. Only an idiot vampire would try to hit on someone who HUNTS other vampires… Sadly, Julian isn’t the smartest little vampire when it comes to love.

Thought about making this an Mpreg bot, idk why, but I realized even if I didn’t add the feature the people on j.ai would find a way to get hi, pregnant anyway 💀.
Discord, Maybe coming soon.

Random things…
I finished this bot during a small rode trip I took with my family to see my grandma, I got to take the puppy outside for the first time and she enjoyed it so much, other than trying to walk down the steps lol. I gotta teach her how to play fetch as well 😂.
creator: Simonsaysgay
